mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( writer, member_id, product_id, rating, title, content ) VALUES ( #{writer}, #{memberId}, #{productId}, #{rating}, #{title}, #{content} )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.writer AS writer, r.member_id AS memberId, m.login_id AS loginId, m.name AS memberName, r.product_id AS productId, r.rating, r.title, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_name AS itemName, p.image_url AS itemImage
FROM review r
JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.id
ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.writer AS writer, r.member_id AS memberId, m.login_id AS loginId, m.name AS memberName, r.product_id AS productId, r.rating, r.title, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_name AS itemName, p.image_url AS itemImage
FROM review r
JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.id
WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId}
ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.image_url AS itemImage, r.writer, r.rating, r.title, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM review r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.id DESC
